title: Screens UI
scenario: Verify that every screen in the Onboarding flow matches the UI design specified in Figma.
steps: Open the onboarding flow on the target device or emulator.
Navigate through each screen of the onboarding flow one by one.
For each screen, compare the UI elements (layout, colors, fonts, images, buttons, text) against the corresponding Figma design.
Document any discrepancies found for each screen.
expected: Every screen in the onboarding flow matches the UI design specified in Figma exactly.
